bio: Influential sociologist and Islamic thinker who helped organize the [Freedom Movement of Iran](/orgs/freedom-movement-of-iran) from France. His lectures at the [Hussainiyyeh Ershad](/orgs/hussainiyyeh-ershad) in Tehran in the early 1970s shaped a generation of revolutionary youth. Advocated for a progressive, anti-imperialist Islam. Imprisoned twice under the Pahlavi regime (3.3 years total). Died under suspicious circumstances in Southampton, England on 18 June 1977 — many believe he was killed by [SAVAK](/orgs/savak).
editorial_notes: Died 1977 in England, suspected SAVAK assassination. Hugely influential on revolutionary generation.
